title: SulphurUpdate
description: This Mod adds Mojang Chaos Cubed update but my fan made edition
body:
# 🧊 Chaos Cubed: The Sulfur Update
The underground just got a lot more toxic.

This fan-made expansion to the Chaos Cubed concept brings a deadly new ecosystem to your Minecraft world. Forget the glitches—prepare to survive the corrosive depths of the yellow wasteland.

## New Biome: The Sulfur Caves
Deep below the surface, the air turns thick and yellow. The Sulfur Caves are a high-risk, high-reward environment where players must navigate treacherous terrain.

Corrosive Landscape: New custom blocks and atmospheric fog.

Toxic Water: Stepping into the vibrant yellow pools isn't just a mistake—it’s a death sentence. Touching this water inflicts heavy Nausea and rapid damage.

## New Mob: The Sulfur Cube
Think Slimes are friendly? Think again.

The Sulfur Cube is a volatile variant that thrives in toxic environments.

Watch your distance; their acidic nature makes them a nightmare in tight cave corridors.

Drops Raw Sulfur, a vital component for new high-tier crafting recipes.

## Mechanics & Hazards
Nausea Overload: Constant exposure to sulfur fumes and toxic water will leave your vision spinning. Bring the right gear, or stay out of the caves!

Resource Gathering: Mine sulfur ore to power new machinery or create explosive new compounds.

### Installation
Platform: NeoForge / soon will be ported to other loaders

Recommended: Use a shader that supports custom fog for the full "toxic atmosphere" experience!

### Compatibility
This mod is designed to work alongside major world-gen mods. However, we recommend starting a new world to see the Sulfur Caves generate in their full glory.
